{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322050804969F7DA7FEACF62FFC90"}"},"total":424},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7162180020378207007","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真是近二十年书龄，我真的觉得评分被低估了！现在这么剧情合理又不做作的很少见了！作者大大再来点后续幸福生活吧！给小紫月准备个弟弟？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667575147,"group_id":"7081168897562381315","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"730495418122136"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081168897562381315","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.962382e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读92小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":106804,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":332569,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7162179207610204958","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我一定要给五星好评！已经很久没有这本小说这么世界观搭建合理，剧情起伏，伏笔紧张有趣还有意思的好小说了！竟然评分只有八点多，真是被严重低估了！加油呀作者！非常棒！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667574961,"group_id":"7081168897562381315","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"绝不看虐文！文笔要好，还不能有bug...完了要没有文可看了！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+z660bhBlnnjY2aZuRpoUI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4d92f13527964ece9ffab1536d58e489~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710722&x-signature=fN8NciDVb85zBiR9aBbHPNeXOQs%3D","user_id":"730495418122136","user_name":"爱吃肉肉肉的瘦瘦瘦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"730495418122136","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081168897562381315","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长系女主剧情流+非爽文+非恋爱文+物种变异+天灾+杀伐果断+团队求生】
红光照耀全球，血雨降临，发热使所有生命体进入沉睡…
顾离一觉醒来，好运的觉醒了特殊的双系异能，还抱上了一根‘粗大腿‘变异玫瑰。
末世后她把空间囤满了物资，异能又能种地。变异种应对自如以后，准备带着家人队友们享受生活。
没想到接踵而至的是天灾，潮湿，高温，干旱，暴雨，洪水，极寒，雪夜....
人类越来越少，最重要的是，随着空间不断的升级，她慢慢发现了一些不同寻常的秘密，关乎着她的性命…
PS：CP设定为老夫老妻，男主性格冷淡，不善言辞，存在感低。
避雷：治愈系男主获得金手指后会失忆一个多月，失忆不失智，身心干净，相遇即相认，没有误会。但还是没耐心想跳章的，就不用看了！非流水账，跳章没法看！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/be86dbb950e2e5708970f35dd14cd46c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"云云亦芸","author_id":"","book_id":"7081168897562381315","book_name":"末世求生：空间升级的秘密","book_short_name":"末世与玫瑰","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7081262555280179715","read_count":"571","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"867040"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"404","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,反派,囤物资,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/028c820b939d0806951d63ea2070456c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311284&x-signature=q35fCpBLrOp2vWKQa%2BBe6zjsJX8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4111769585067847","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.9613747e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322050804969F7DA7FEACF62FFC90"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":106529,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":166142,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1693},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1667833808,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7460164313859851070","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢 很多人吐槽吧 但是我整体看下来觉得还行 可以看 主要是看每个人的意见吧 主角就是整个人设方面没有树立的很好 包括他这个故事线方面也有问题 人物性格其实还可以 整体还不错 希望作者宝宝继续努力💪我相信你能写的越来越好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736965064,"group_id":"7081168897562381315","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1YLyPGEG73z/Mp+X9dvNsUAHjETBV1jmKVso4MBHI74","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/715de6c2d249478b8585c80fa5d115eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710082&x-signature=vMZZBdCEz%2Bn1z17c4u0dl47zrsU%3D","user_id":"2915499871838348","user_name":"和阿廷约会"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2915499871838348","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770965634,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081168897562381315","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长系女主剧情流+非爽文+非恋爱文+物种变异+天灾+杀伐果断+团队求生】
红光照耀全球，血雨降临，发热使所有生命体进入沉睡…
顾离一觉醒来，好运的觉醒了特殊的双系异能，还抱上了一根‘粗大腿‘变异玫瑰。
末世后她把空间囤满了物资，异能又能种地。变异种应对自如以后，准备带着家人队友们享受生活。
没想到接踵而至的是天灾，潮湿，高温，干旱，暴雨，洪水，极寒，雪夜....
人类越来越少，最重要的是，随着空间不断的升级，她慢慢发现了一些不同寻常的秘密，关乎着她的性命…
PS：CP设定为老夫老妻，男主性格冷淡，不善言辞，存在感低。
避雷：治愈系男主获得金手指后会失忆一个多月，失忆不失智，身心干净，相遇即相认，没有误会。但还是没耐心想跳章的，就不用看了！非流水账，跳章没法看！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/be86dbb950e2e5708970f35dd14cd46c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"云云亦芸","author_id":"","book_id":"7081168897562381315","book_name":"末世求生：空间升级的秘密","book_short_name":"末世与玫瑰","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7081262555280179715","read_count":"571","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"867040"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"404","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,反派,囤物资,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/028c820b939d0806951d63ea2070456c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311284&x-signature=q35fCpBLrOp2vWKQa%2BBe6zjsJX8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4111769585067847","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"448"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322050804969F7DA7FEACF62FFC90"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":32298,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":858},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405152523195417369","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本女主逐渐成长型的小说，细腻的描写了女主从一个普通人慢慢成为强者的轨迹和心理的转变，总体来说伏笔埋的比较多，大部分的坑都填了，有一小部分到结尾的时候还没有填，不过也不影响观看。作者的构思我觉得还是挺出彩的，情节也紧凑不拖拉，每一章都有认真的看完。
最后的最后要表示一下对藤音的心疼，希望以后在和小爱合二为一的日子里，感受到人类对它的爱，淡化它对人类的仇恨。
另外其实觉得最可怜的还是藤鑫，就这样魂飞魄散了，他做错了什么？虽然是另外一个故事，但是心情就是忍不住的沉重，期望他可以在另一个世界幸福的生活。","text_exts":[{"e":29,"s":26,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774127284F62FFC90%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227405152523195417369%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227081168897562381315%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724149770,"group_id":"7081168897562381315","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N71W+Qazjc4oOd88mK0Jv1nHMMneGjfbmzHVFDIM88uG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/2151d848b88545ccbbadfd84c76a7fa5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710413&x-signature=OAoGEO5aCszeVVzOG71FnFweJ5I%3D","user_id":"1072741782397296","user_name":"筱薇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1072741782397296","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7081168897562381315","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长系女主剧情流+非爽文+非恋爱文+物种变异+天灾+杀伐果断+团队求生】
